subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Blessed Beauty! A letter hath been received from that handmaiden of God, Munírih, the radiant mother, which is evidence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیز جمال ابهی نامه ای از ان امة الله منیره والده باهره رسید دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the arts and sciences, @praise and encouragement, @education of children; moral education
